rows.description: Lom Rent - 05.12.0.
rows.notes: Clear reading for description and amounts. The '05' for pounds is clearly '5'. Values are in P.S.D. format. Vertical lines faint, but alignment is clear. All monetary values are within valid ranges.

rows.description: Total of Years Rent
rows.notes: Clear reading for the description and amounts. The horizontal line above indicates a total. Sum of preceding entries (rows 19 and 20) is accurate (265+5=270, 0+12=12, 0+0=0). Vertical lines faint, but alignment clear. All monetary values are within valid ranges.

rows.description: Rep. Mr. House - 7-6-7
rows.notes: Clear reading for amounts. Description 'Mr. House' is legible, although 'House' could be misread as 'Hove' or similar; 'House' is most contextually probable for repairs. Values are presented in P-S-D format. Vertical lines faint, but alignment clear. All monetary values are within valid ranges.

rows.description: Dr. of Chancey - 0-8-9
rows.notes: Clear reading for description and amounts. 'Dr.' is likely an abbreviation for a name or 'debtor'. Values are presented in P-S-D format. Vertical lines faint, but alignment clear. All monetary values are within valid ranges.

rows.description: Total of Deductions
rows.notes: Clear reading for the description and amounts. This total row has particularly clear vertical ruling lines, used as a primary alignment reference. The sum of preceding entries (rows 23-26) (34+6+7+0=47£, 7+10+6+8=31s=1£ 11s, 0+10+7+9=26d=2s 2d, totalling 48£ 13s 2d) does not match the written ledger entry of 48£ 12s 4d. The extracted values reflect the written ledger entry exactly, despite the arithmetic discrepancy. All monetary values are within valid ranges.

rows.description: Remains clear for the Years Rent
rows.notes: This row combines descriptive text from two visual lines into one logical total entry, as per guidance. The amount is derived from 'Total of Years Rent' (row 21) minus 'Total of Deductions' (row 27) (270£ 12s 0d - 48£ 12s 4d), which accurately calculates to 221£ 19s 8d. Vertical ruling lines clear. All monetary values are within valid ranges.

rows.description: Grand Total
rows.notes: Clear reading for the total amount. The pence digit '7' is followed by a clear '½' symbol, interpreted as a half-penny. This final total line has very clear vertical ruling lines, used as a primary alignment reference. Independent calculation of the sum of 'Recepta varia' (rows 2-16 total 892£ 12s 11.75d) and 'Remains clear for the Years Rent' (row 28 totals 221£ 19s 8d) yields 1114£ 12s 7.75d, which does not match the ledger's written grand total of 1094£ 12s 7½d. The extracted values reflect the written ledger entry exactly despite the arithmetic discrepancy. All monetary values are within valid ranges.
